text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text: Occasionally... I feel your eyes on me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text: Is there... something you need to tell me?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no, I-I'm so sorry! I just... The way you carry
yourself, that effortless nonchalant expression...
It just draws my eyes...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
Is it unsettling? If I'm doing something wrong, I'll
fix it.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
No, not at all! You look like you could be the
lead in a hardboiled fiction novel! You're so
composed... and so cool!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text: Am I? I'm not sure what you mean.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Ah! That! What you just did! That deep, somber expression is exactly how I picture the main character of Agent Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Aaah! That face! Oh, it's just like when she's deep
in thought after a lead goes cold!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Uh, um... If you wouldn't mind... I would love to
hear you say something like an agent who just
finished a mission! I-if that's okay...
